mapper.select: SELECT preference_id, user_id, preferred_genres, preferred_moods, preferred_platforms, excluded_keywords, disliked_genres, favorite_movies, created_at, updated_at FROM user_preferences WHERE preference_id = #{preferenceId}

SELECT preference_id, user_id, preferred_genres, preferred_moods, preferred_platforms, excluded_keywords, disliked_genres, favorite_movies, created_at, updated_at FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preferences ( user_id, preferred_genres, preferred_moods, preferred_platforms, excluded_keywords, disliked_genres, favorite_movies, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{user.userId}, #{preferredGenres}, #{preferredMoods}, #{preferredPlatforms}, #{excludedKeywords}, #{dislikedGenres}, #{favoriteMovies}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_preferences SET preferred_genres = #{preferredGenres}, preferred_moods = #{preferredMoods}, preferred_platforms = #{preferredPlatforms}, excluded_keywords = #{excludedKeywords}, disliked_genres = #{dislikedGenres}, favorite_movies = #{favoriteMovies}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE preference_id = #{preferenceId}
